name: World Director (Local)
tagline: Observe, record, and direct a mini AI town — local-Executa edition.
description:
World Director (Local) is an experience-type Anna App. Users open it in Anna chat to observe and intervene in a mini AI town where a handful of residents live, interact, and evolve.

**What's inside**

- A static single-window UI (CSS Grid map + timeline + director panel).
- `truman-director` — a bundled Python Executa that ticks the world and persists it to Anna Storage. Every tick, agent actions come straight from the host LLM via sampling with a strict json_schema response_format — no rule engine.
- This is the local-Executa (focus-flow) edition: the Executa runs on the user's local Matrix Agent, so the Agent must be online. A separate pure-cloud edition (no Agent needed) lives on the main branch.
